problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Magnetohydrodynamic. Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
